title: Ratty's Enchanted Tools and Weapons
description: Variant Textures for your Tools and Weapons which display enchantments applied. Never grab the wrong tool or weapon.
body:
![Ratty's Enchanted Tools & Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5183a5f13f15a4a0da4a36678deed76adfdb2c42.png)

![Image with a lot of different versions of items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33d7e6a023fb194aea720247585f46cbd1228aaa.jpeg)

### Find you **Silk Touch** or **Fortune** easily with **Ratty's Enchanted Tools and Weapons**. This Resource pack changes all the Tool and Weapon skins so you can view which enchantments are on them.

## INCLUDED IN THIS RESOURCE PACK
- Pickaxes
- Shovels
- Hoes
- Axes
- Swords
- Spears
- Maces
- Bows
- Crossbows
- Tridents
- Shears
- Flint and Steal
- Fishing Rods
- Carrot and Shroom on a Stick
- Litematica and WorldEdit wands

![Ratty Wielding a Bane of Arthropods Spear and a Smite Sword infront of a display of Maces](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9746844469ab8db9bcfa4c13054e198d96aad9b6_0.webp)

Every material of tool's texture is modified, showing you which enchantments have been applied

![Tool Diagram](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/271c039442760085d5c28e9ebf07828cb196ea38.jpeg)

Weapons show all enchantments applied to them

![Wielding Flaming Bane of Arthropods Sword in front of display of swords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d30aa7926e77358851fde2e6474d03b5f934677_0.webp)

![Sword Diagram](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b2b49eca35da8eba8891525b7b352dd19b2404c.jpeg)

![3D Mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcea694d1cd9fb4eafa2dbd836a5a87f60062147_0.webp)

![Mace Diagram](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0edf7e62ccf789c703d5e07db09fea2ab139fdd.png)

![Trident Diagram](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74864daa75a824e181e2614fba3abb1906bec3c2.png)

Install [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) to get access to more options including 3D maces and additional animations. It also works with [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) Allowing Flaming and Enchanted Weapons to light up the area around you (which can be disabled in Respackopts)

[World Download for my Tool Workshop so you can view all varients](https://drive.google.com/file/d/10XR5HeHhZTYVU9ePQwGpwxxgpxUY0kZL/view?usp=sharing)
